title: Infrastructure as Code for Quantum Systems
description: Learn to manage quantum computing infrastructure using code-based approaches. Master Terraform, Pulumi, and cloud-native tools for provisioning quantum resources, managing access, and automating environment setup.
learningObjectives: Apply Infrastructure as Code principles to quantum computing environments
Use Terraform to provision cloud resources for quantum workloads
Manage quantum backend access and credentials declaratively
Create reproducible quantum development environments with configuration management
Implement GitOps workflows for quantum infrastructure changes
Automate quantum cluster provisioning with proper security controls
